extortion.description: (database dumps inside) HKG Duty Free is the market leader in electronics, but also now developing comprehensive fashion brand portfolio including Mont Blanc, Fossil, Michael Kors, A/X Armani Exchange, Diesel, DKNY, Adidas, Guess, Tommy Hilfiger, Casio, and Lacoste. Also, HKG Duty Free offers wide array of famous fragrance brands launching new programs throughout the year. In addition, popular international and domestic spirits and tobacco brand are offered tax free for export in all HKG Duty Free locations. Moving south, HKG recently acquired two stores located in Belize offering the same brands and categories to customers crossing into Mexico. Coming soon, HKG will introduce its first Duty Free Store opening in Queretaro International Airport, Mexico.
